name: marp-slide-studio
description: Sophisticated Marp slide decks with AI — 63 brand-grounded design systems (4 curated + 59 on-demand), multilingual CJK + Latin typography, and a Playwright visual-QA loop. One-command autopilot from topic to PDF + PPTX.

plugins.name: marp-slide-studio
plugins.description: Build Marp presentations that don't look AI-generated. 8 skills, 3 agents, 63 themes (Stripe/Apple/Linear/Notion/Tesla/Figma/Spotify/IBM/BMW/Ferrari and more), multilingual typography (Korean/Japanese/Chinese/English), 6 autopilot presets, Playwright visual refinement loop.
plugins.author: Min-Gul Kim
